rationale: Every field is spec-meaningful for a write-restricted subregion: start_/len_ delimit the slice, constants_ and initial_region_view_ pin the underlying PM model at construction time, and is_writable_absolute_addr_fn_ encodes the write-permission predicate the spec reasons about. Each Ghost<_> is unwrapped with a single @; the inner types (nat, PersistentMemoryConstants, PersistentMemoryRegionView, spec_fn) are leaf/primitive and carry no separate View, so structural equality on them is already semantic.
